2022-23 Valparaiso Beacons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 11-21 (5-15, 10th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Matt Lottich

PS/G: 68.9 (249th of 363)

PA/G: 73.6 (280th of 363)

SRS: -8.72 (287th of 363)

SOS: -2.75 (219th of 363)

ORtg: 98.1 (311th of 363)

DRtg: 104.7 (259th of 363)
